chapter_title.en: Chapter on Categories Upon Whom Zakat is Obligatory

parts.text: 1621 - وَ رَوَى عَنْهُ هِشَامُ بْنُ اَلْحَكَمِ رَحِمَهُ اَللَّهُ: فِي

text: اَلرَّجُلِ يُعْطَى اَلزَّكَاةَ يَقْسِمُهَا أَ لَهُ أَنْ يُخْرِجَ اَلشَّيْءَ مِنْهَا مِنَ اَلْبَلْدَةِ اَلَّتِي هُوَ بِهَا إِلَى غَيْرِهَا قَالَ «لاَ بَأْسَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1621 - Hisham ibn al-Hakam, may Allah (swt) have mercy on him, narrated from him (Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as)) regarding a man who is given Zakat to distribute: "Is it permissible for him to take a portion of it from the town where he resides to another?"
Imam (as) replied: "There is no issue."
